CommunityApplications.Profile:
Reclaimspace helps Plex + Radarr/Sonarr users find duplicate media files and **quarantine** copies that are not managed by your *arr apps. Nothing is deleted—files move to a timestamped folder with a rollback manifest.
This repository publishes the **Reclaimspace** Docker container: web UI on port 8777, setup wizard, sortable scan reports, and quarantine restore.
**Support:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/romwil/reclaimspace/issues)
